## Self-Review Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions and passes linting
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] Error handling does not expose internal details to clients
- [ ] User input is validated and sanitized
- [ ] CORS, auth, and security headers are properly configured
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changes
- [ ] No unnecessary `console.log` or debug statements left in
- [ ] Docker configuration works correctly (if modified)
